## Authorship
- PR type: Human-only / Agent-only / Mixed
- Human contributors: @username (or `None`)
- Agent contributors: `{Model Name}` via `{Client Tool}` (repeat as needed; use `None` if no agent contributed)
- Remove any unused placeholder text before submitting.

## Summary
- Problem:
- Approach:
- Outcome:

## Changes
- `path/to/file`: what changed and why

## Validation
- `command`: result
- `command`: result
- Not run (if any): reason and residual risk

## Risks and Rollback
- Risk:
- Mitigation:
- Rollback:

## Docs Consistency
- `docs/design.md`: Updated / No impact (explain)
- `README.md`: Updated / No impact (explain)

## Review Feedback Mapping (if applicable)
| # | Finding | Status | Evidence / Rationale |
|---|---------|--------|----------------------|
| 1 | ... | Resolved | commit/file evidence |

## Follow-Ups
- [ ] None
